_comment: Copy to dolphin.local.json (gitignored) and edit for your machine. Every key is optional and overrides a computed default; env vars (TWW_ISOS_DIR, DOLPHIN_EXE, TWWGZ_SLATE) override this file. See harness/dolphin_env.py.
dolphin_exe: C:/path/to/Dolphin-Zelda-TAS-Edition/Binary/x64/Release/Dolphin.exe (default: the Release build in the sibling Dolphin-Zelda-TAS-Edition checkout)
